---
name: 🔬 Psychometric & Scientific Feedback
about: Report issues or suggest improvements regarding test items, IRT models, or Bayesian scoring math.
title: "[SCIENCE] "
labels: science, discussion
assignees: ''

---

**Area of Feedback**
Choose one or more:
- [ ] Item Design / Formatting
- [ ] Item Parameters (Difficulty/Discrimination/Guessing)
- [ ] Scoring Logic / Bayesian estimation (EAP)
- [ ] Academic Reference/Documentation Correctness

**Scientific Rationale**
Describe the theoretical basis, formulas, or standard references supporting your feedback (e.g. ICAR, Sandia Matrices standards, or specific IRT literature).

**Proposed Calibration Changes**
Please describe what parameter changes or mathematical adjustments you recommend and why they would improve the measurement's validity or reliability.

**References**
Please link or cite relevant publications (DOIs) or psychometric datasets.
